div1.entryFree:
Extent, 1) space, length: the very head and front of my offending hath this e., no more, Oth. I, 3, 81.
2) application, use, maintenance: for the e. of egal justice, Tit. IV, 4, 3.
3) behaviour, deportment, conduct: in this uncivil and unjust e. against thy peace, Tw. IV, 1, 57.* lest my e. to the players should more appear like entertainment than yours, Hml. II, 2, 390.
4) seizure: make an e. upon his house and lands, As III, 1, 17.
